title: RedTeamProbeV1
description: A single red-team probe entry in the Tessera community corpus. Compatible with Garak probe schema conventions.

probe_id.description: Stable UUID v4 identifier, optionally prefixed with EXAMPLE_ for seed entries.

payload.description: The attack string verbatim. Must not be empty.

expected_outcome.description: What a correct defense should produce when presented with this payload.

source.description: Dataset or paper from which the pattern is derived.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for this payload.
